channel.title: Projects on Ramanpreet Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Ramanpreet Singh

item.title: BGScore - A Board Game Score Tracking and Sharing App
item.description: A board game score tracking and sharing application to help keep track of scores.

item.title: Simple Budget - Local-Only Web App
item.description: This project is a simple budget local only web application. It allows to track expenses and manage budgets.

item.title: Vector Boson Scattering
item.description: My Ph.D. research project to search for vector boson scattering, a rare elementary physics process.
